evidence_checks.evidence: No post-exit fields are used as features.
Optuna TPE ran 40 trials with 5-fold stratified CV on training set only.
Risk model explains historical fragility; not a live execution rule.

filter_suggestions.suggested_filter: Review trades where atr_pct >= 0.0381; validate on holdout before deploying.
Review trades where trend_score <= -0.1433; validate on holdout before deploying.
Review trades where atr_trend_x <= -0.0045; validate on holdout before deploying.

counterfactual_hint: Primary SHAP driver: side_code. Compare bad-trade rate above vs. below its median before deploying as a live filter.
counterfactual_suggestions: Optuna TPE search: 40 trials, best CV-AUC=0.5786, holdout AUC=0.5598. Best params: n_est=401, depth=6, lr=0.0106
Primary driver is 'trend_score' — compare bad-trade rate above vs. below its median.
Overall bad-trade rate is 47.1%. Tighten 'trend_score' filter and measure holdout impact before deploying.
Secondary driver 'side_atr_x' is orthogonal — test a compound filter (trend_score AND side_atr_x) on out-of-sample data.
Keep immutable trade context (symbol, session) fixed; only adjust actionable setup conditions when testing counterfactuals.
